name: Ihara Science Corporation
summary: Ihara Science Corporation manufactures and sells fittings, valves, hoses, and pipes primarily in Japan, Taiwan, China, South Korea, North America, Southeast Asia, Europe, and Australia. It offers fittings, including double ferule type tube fittings, resin tube fittings, vinyl hose and weldless fittings, automatic weld fittings, metal gasket seal type fittings, metal gasket seal fittings, and swivel joints, as well as quick joint fittings, biting fittings, high-pressure screw-in/insert welded joint, hose joint, branch header piping, and inline filter. The company also provides bellow and metal diaphragm, ball, stop, stainless check, and piston valves; metal flexible tubes, precision carbon steel galvanized steel pipe, and stainless steel tubes; and tube cutters and pre-setting devices. The company was formerly known as Ihara High Pressure Fittings Co.,Ltd. and changed its name to Ihara Science Corporation in October 1997. Ihara Science Corporation was founded in 1941 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
